11/26/18 05:00PM - 08:00PM Location HP Auditorium Event type Prodev Description Come out to learn about why you'd pursue a masters/PhD and how to go strengthening your application to grad school! Panelists will be current grad students at Berkeley.
elists will be current grad students at Berkeley. This will be a public event in collaboration with IEEE. Add to iCal | Back to Calendar Eta Kappa Nu, Mu Chapter HOME | CONTACT
